---
# screenshot: framed
format:
  typst:
    papersize: us-letter
    margin:
      top: 0.75in
      bottom: 0.75in
      left: 0.6in
      right: 0.6in
    columns: 2
    page-numbering: ""
---

```{=typst}
#block(fill: rgb("#d6d6d6"), width: 100%, height: 9.5in, radius: 1pt)
#colbreak()
#block(fill: rgb("#d6d6d6"), width: 100%, height: 6in, radius: 1pt)
```
